message:
fix(session-context): preserve hypothesis cards when archiving

The removeAlternativeHypothesis function was deleting hypothesis cards
from hypothesisCards when moving hypotheses to archivedHypothesisIds.
This made archived hypothesis data inaccessible, contradicting the
documented purpose: "Kept for learning and audit trails."

Now the card is preserved in hypothesisCards while only moving the ID
from alternativeHypothesisIds to archivedHypothesisIds.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
